reason: Verified that Super Agent can successfully execute browser tools to open a URL and retrieve the page title, with correct response confirmation.
steps: 1. Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent interface with sidebar containing three agents.
2. Found and clicked the "QA-20260421-152022-whiv" agent in the sidebar - Agent chat view opened successfully with message input field visible.
3. Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into the message input field - Message was entered correctly and Send button became enabled.
4. Clicked Send button to submit the message - Message was sent successfully, agent status changed from "idle" to "working", and session "Browser Navigation Title Retrieval Test" was created.
5. Waited for agent response within 3-minute timeout - Agent completed task in 10 seconds, executed two tool calls:

6. Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response correctly displays: "The page title is Example Domain." The live browser preview on the right also shows the Example Domain page. The agent completed the task accurately with all expected information provided.
